exercises.header: I live in a small house.
My house is near the sea.
exercises.answer: Το σπίτι μου είναι κοντά στη θάλασσα.

exercises.header: I am renting an apartment in the center.
My apartment is on the second floor.
exercises.answer: Το διαμέρισμά μου είναι στον δεύτερο όροφο.

exercises.header: I dream of buying a detached house.
The detached house has a large garden.
They live in a beautiful two-story house.
The two-story house has a roof terrace.
I live in the building next to the park.
exercises.answer: Μένω στο κτίριο δίπλα στο πάρκο.

exercises.header: The entrance of the building is on the left.
exercises.answer: Η είσοδος του κτιρίου είναι στα αριστερά.

exercises.header: I am waiting for you at the entrance.
